description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical handle with a dark brown finish, reinforced by metallic bands and bolts along its length. The head is large and industrial, composed of a thick, black metallic cylinder with a flanged, bolted end and a reinforced striking face. The opposite end of the head is capped with a rounded, solid section, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty impact rather than prying or pulling. The handle appears to be straight and solid, with a smooth surface and no visible ergonomic grip enhancements. The overall construction is heavy and utilitarian, likely intended for industrial or construction use in urban environments. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a dark brown cylindrical handle and a large, black metallic head featuring flanged and bolted details. The design is industrial and robust, suitable for demanding urban tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the cylindrical handle and the large, flanged head with visible bolts.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the striking face of the hammer's head and the alignment of the handle, with metallic reinforcements visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the rounded end of the hammer's head, emphasizing its solid construction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer's head and the straight handle, with the bolted structure clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a smooth, dark brown finish and metallic reinforcement bands
attribute_head_type: large industrial sledge-type head with a flanged, bolted striking face and a rounded solid back
